base.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
base.author: Mark Twain

base.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
base.author: Nelson Mandela

base.text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
base.author: Confucius

base.text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
base.author: Benjamin Franklin

base.text: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
base.author: Mahatma Gandhi

base.text: Motivation gets you started. Habit keeps you going.
base.author: Jim Ryun

base.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
base.author: Aristotle

base.text: Confine yourself to the present.
base.author: Marcus Aurelius

base.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
base.author: Marcus Aurelius

base.text: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
base.author: Marcus Aurelius

base.text: All of humanity's problems stem from man's inability to sit quietly in a room alone.
base.author: Blaise Pascal

base.text: Begin at once to live.
base.author: Seneca

base.text: While we delay, life passes.
base.author: Seneca

base.text: It's not that I'm so smart, it's just that I stay with problems longer.
base.author: Albert Einstein

base.text: Genius is one percent inspiration, ninety-nine percent perspiration.
base.author: Thomas Edison

base.text: The future depends on what you do today.
base.author: Mahatma Gandhi

base.text: Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Willing is not enough; we must do.
base.author: Goethe

base.text: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled.
base.author: Plutarch

base.text: The price of anything is the amount of life you exchange for it.
base.author: Henry David Thoreau

base.text: Beware the barrenness of a busy life.
base.author: Socrates

base.text: You don't have to see the whole staircase, just take the first step.
base.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

base.text: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet.
base.author: Aristotle

base.text: Mastery requires patience. Excellence is earned through repetition.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: Every session adds a brick. Every brick builds something lasting.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: The best time to study was yesterday. The second best time is now.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: Showing up is half the battle. The other half is staying.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: One hour of focused work beats three hours of distracted effort.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: The phone will still be there in two hours. The focus won't.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: Your future self is watching you right now through your memories.
base.author: Studyflow

base.text: Starve your distractions. Feed your focus.
base.author: Studyflow

growth.text: We do not learn from experience. We learn from reflecting on experience.
growth.author: John Dewey

growth.text: The capacity to learn is a gift; the ability to learn is a skill; the willingness to learn is a choice.
growth.author: Brian Herbert

growth.text: Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty.
growth.author: Henry Ford

growth.text: Develop a passion for learning. If you do, you will never cease to grow.
growth.author: Anthony J. D'Angelo

growth.text: Every artist was first an amateur.
growth.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

growth.text: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
growth.author: Helen Hayes

growth.text: The beautiful thing about learning is that nobody can take it away from you.
growth.author: B.B. King

growth.text: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities, but in the expert's mind there are few.
growth.author: Shunryu Suzuki

growth.text: Learning is the only thing the mind never exhausts, never fears, and never regrets.
growth.author: Leonardo da Vinci

growth.text: The more I learn, the more I realize how much I don't know.
growth.author: Albert Einstein

growth.text: Once you stop learning, you start dying.
growth.author: Albert Einstein

growth.text: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.
growth.author: W.B. Yeats

growth.text: Mistakes are the portals of discovery.
growth.author: James Joyce

growth.text: Struggle is not the opposite of success — it is the path.
growth.author: Studyflow

growth.text: Each page you read today is a brick in who you become tomorrow.
growth.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task.
deep_work.author: Cal Newport

deep_work.text: A deep life is a good life.
deep_work.author: Cal Newport

deep_work.text: Clarity about what matters provides clarity about what does not.
deep_work.author: Cal Newport

deep_work.text: The ability to perform deep work is becoming increasingly rare at exactly the same time it is becoming increasingly valuable.
deep_work.author: Cal Newport

deep_work.text: Busyness as a proxy for productivity: doing lots of stuff in a visible manner.
deep_work.author: Cal Newport

deep_work.text: If you don't produce, you won't thrive — no matter how skilled or talented you are.
deep_work.author: Cal Newport

deep_work.text: Focus is the new IQ.
deep_work.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: Attention is the most valuable asset in the knowledge economy.
deep_work.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: Concentration is the root of all the higher abilities in man.
deep_work.author: Bruce Lee

deep_work.text: You can do anything, but not everything.
deep_work.author: David Allen

deep_work.text: Attention, taken to its highest degree, is the same thing as prayer.
deep_work.author: Simone Weil

deep_work.text: The hours you put in when you don't feel like it are what separate you from everyone else.
deep_work.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: Real work happens in the spaces between notifications.
deep_work.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: Flow state is not found. It is built, brick by brick, minute by minute.
deep_work.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: Silence is the canvas on which understanding is painted.
deep_work.author: Studyflow

deep_work.text: To do two things at once is to do neither.
deep_work.author: Publilius Syrus

deep_work.text: Leisure is the mother of philosophy.
deep_work.author: Thomas Hobbes

deep_work.text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
deep_work.author: Leonardo da Vinci

deep_work.text: The shorter way to do many things is to only do one thing at a time.
deep_work.author: Mozart

deep_work.text: Lost time is never found again.
deep_work.author: Benjamin Franklin

perseverance.text: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
perseverance.author: Thomas Edison

perseverance.text: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
perseverance.author: Confucius

perseverance.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
perseverance.author: Confucius

perseverance.text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
perseverance.author: Benjamin Franklin

perseverance.text: Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after the other.
perseverance.author: Walter Elliot

perseverance.text: Through perseverance many people win success out of what seemed destined to be failure.
perseverance.author: Benjamin Disraeli

perseverance.text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
perseverance.author: Japanese Proverb

perseverance.text: Strength does not come from winning. Your struggles develop your strengths.
perseverance.author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

perseverance.text: You just can't beat the person who never gives up.
perseverance.author: Babe Ruth

perseverance.text: Hard days are what make a champion.
perseverance.author: Studyflow

perseverance.text: The hard sessions count most. Anyone can study when it's easy.
perseverance.author: Studyflow

perseverance.text: When you feel like quitting, think about why you started.
perseverance.author: Studyflow

perseverance.text: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
perseverance.author: Jimmy Johnson

perseverance.text: Champions are made in the moments they want to quit but don't.
perseverance.author: Studyflow
